word: H3260 - יֶעְדִּי - Yeʻdîy - yed-ee' - Iddo See H3035

sections.paragraph:
Original: יעדּי

Transliteration: ye‛dı̂y

Phonetic: yed-ee'

BDB Definition:

Iddo = "appointed"
  1. the seer who proclaimed to king Jeroboam of Israel

Origin: from H3259

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
